mapper.select:
SELECT hotel_id AS hotelId, COUNT(*) AS viewCount FROM user_action_log
AND action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL'
AND hotel_id IN
#{id}
GROUP BY hotel_id

SELECT CASE WHEN show_price < 100 THEN '<¥100' WHEN show_price >= 100 AND show_price < 200 THEN '¥100-200' WHEN show_price >= 200 AND show_price < 350 THEN '¥200-350' WHEN show_price >= 350 AND show_price < 500 THEN '¥350-500' WHEN show_price >= 500 AND show_price < 800 THEN '¥500-800' ELSE '>¥800' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM user_action_log WHERE action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL' AND user_id = #{userId} AND show_price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name

SELECT CASE WHEN comment_count < 500 THEN '0-500' WHEN comment_count >= 500 AND comment_count < 1000 THEN '500-1000' WHEN comment_count >= 1000 AND comment_count < 2000 THEN '1000-2000' WHEN comment_count >= 2000 AND comment_count < 3000 THEN '2000-3000' WHEN comment_count >= 3000 AND comment_count < 4000 THEN '3000-4000' WHEN comment_count >= 4000 AND comment_count < 5000 THEN '4000-5000' WHEN comment_count >= 5000 AND comment_count < 7000 THEN '5000-7000' WHEN comment_count >= 7000 AND comment_count < 10000 THEN '7000-10000' WHEN comment_count >= 10000 THEN '>=10000' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM user_action_log
AND user_id = #{userId} AND action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL' AND comment_count IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY name

SELECT CASE WHEN comment_score >= 0.0 AND comment_score < 3.0 THEN '0.0-3.0' WHEN comment_score >= 3.0 AND comment_score < 3.5 THEN '3.0-3.5' WHEN comment_score >= 3.5 AND comment_score < 4.0 THEN '3.5-4.0' WHEN comment_score >= 4.0 AND comment_score < 4.5 THEN '4.0-4.5' WHEN comment_score >= 4.5 AND comment_score < 4.8 THEN '4.5-4.8' WHEN comment_score >= 4.8 AND comment_score < 5.0 THEN '4.8-5.0' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM user_action_log
AND user_id = #{userId} AND action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL' AND comment_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY name

SELECT AVG(hygiene_score) as hygiene, AVG(environment_score) as environment, AVG(device_score) as facility, AVG(service_score) as service, AVG(star) as star FROM user_action_log uas
AND user_id = #{userId} AND action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL'

SELECT hs.open_year,count(*) as count FROM user_action_log as ual left join hotel_base as hs ON ual.hotel_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = hs.id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND user_id = #{userId} AND ual.action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL' AND hs.open_year IS NOT NULL
group by hs.open_year ORDER BY hs.open_year ASC

SELECT h.room_count, COUNT(*) as frequency FROM user_action_log ual INNER JOIN hotel_base h ON ual.hotel_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = h.id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND ual.user_id = #{userId} AND ual.action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL' AND h.room_count IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY h.room_count

SELECT hf.name FROM user_action_log AS ual INNER JOIN hotel_facility AS hf ON ual.hotel_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = hf.hotel_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND ual.user_id = #{userId} AND ual.action_type = 'VIEW_DETAIL' AND hf.name IS NOT NULL

SELECT min_area, max_area, action_type FROM user_action_log
AND user_id = #{userId} AND action_type IN ('VIEW_DETAIL', 'CLICK_TRIP') AND min_area IS NOT NULL AND max_area IS NOT NULL
